key_events: Jan 12: Weekly crypto positions resolve — 3/3 NO bets win (+$27.11).
Jan 28: FOMC holds rates as expected. No trade (already priced in).
Jan 30: Kevin Warsh nominated as Fed Chair. Monetary policy uncertainty rises.
Jan 31: Govt shutdown begins. Shutdown YES bet resolves +$50.05.

trades.entry_reasoning: BTC at $91k needs +10% in 6 days. No catalyst. FOMC not until Jan 28.
trades.deduction: Absence of catalyst + short timeframe = extreme price targets fail

trades.entry_reasoning: ETH at $3,300, support above $3k. No crash catalyst in 6-day window.
trades.deduction: Support levels hold without external shock

trades.entry_reasoning: SOL recovery is sluggish post-crash. No DeFi narrative driver for 8% rally in a week.
trades.deduction: Post-crash recoveries are gradual, not explosive

trades.entry_reasoning: Sahm Rule triggered (never wrong). Unemployment 4.6%. Yield curve was inverted 18mo. CAPE at 40.
trades.deduction: Sahm Rule + CAPE extremes + unanimous optimism = recession underpriced

trades.entry_reasoning: Hedge: if no recession, inflation stays sticky → Fed forced to hike. Market pricing 0% chance = free option.
trades.deduction: When probability is priced at 0%, any move toward nonzero = profit

trades.entry_reasoning: Tail risk play. If recession → crisis → emergency cut (2008, 2020 pattern). Correlated with recession bet.
trades.deduction: Crisis response pattern: recession → market crash → emergency Fed action

trades.market: US Government Shutdown by Jan 31 YES
trades.entry_reasoning: CR expiring, narrow House majority (220-215), hardliners demanding cuts, DOGE pressure.
trades.deduction: Political dysfunction is predictable. Narrow majorities + ideological wings = gridlock

key_events: Feb 3: DHS shutdown bet opened. BTC NO $85k monthly opened.
Feb 13: DHS funding lapsed — shutdown bet wins (+$55.25).
Feb 15: Iran strikes bet opened at $0.40. Carrier group deployed.
Feb 20: Q4 GDP prints 1.4% (vs 2.8% forecast). S&P drops. Daily DOWN wins (+$30.25).
Feb 28: US strikes Iran. Largest Polymarket geopolitical market resolves. (+$37.20). BTC NO $85k wins (+$32.40).

trades.market: DHS Funding Lapses After Feb 13 YES
trades.entry_reasoning: Jan shutdown CR only funded DHS through Feb 13. Same gridlock dynamics. No resolution in sight.
trades.deduction: Extend-and-pretend CRs create predictable future deadlines

trades.market: BTC does NOT hit $85k in February
trades.entry_reasoning: BTC at $78.7k, crashed 10% in Jan. Leverage unwind ongoing. No catalyst for recovery to $85k. Feb historically weak for crypto.
trades.deduction: Leverage unwinds don't reverse in weeks. BTC peaked at $79k in Feb.

trades.market: S&P 500 DOWN on Feb 20 (GDP Release Day)
trades.entry_reasoning: Q4 GDP releasing today. Consumer spending weak, exports fell, shutdown impact. Consensus 2.8% is too high. Miss = selloff.
trades.deduction: GDP miss → same-day selloff is one of the most reliable patterns in equity markets

trades.market: US Strikes Iran by Feb 28 YES
trades.entry_reasoning: Carrier group deployed, Trump rhetoric escalating, Feb 28 ultimatum. Public signals point to action. Market still hedging at 40%.
trades.deduction: Military deployments + ultimatum deadlines + executive rhetoric = strikes incoming

key_events: Mar 6: Nonfarm payrolls -92k. S&P drops. Daily DOWN wins (+$30.25).
Mar 10: Khamenei death bet opened at $0.30.
Mar 13: S&P ATH NO bet opened. Market at lowest close of 2026.
Mar 15: FOMC No Change bet opened at $0.92.
Mar 18: FOMC holds 3.50-3.75% (11-1). No Change wins (+$10.80).
Mar 25: Iran rejects ceasefire. Ceasefire/Oil bet opened.
Mar 29: Khamenei death confirmed. YES wins (+$58.10).
Mar 30: Oil ceasefire NO position marked-to-market at $0.80 (+$3.78).

trades.entry_reasoning: Nonfarm payrolls releasing. DOGE hiring freeze, shutdown impacts, oil shock hitting employment. Negative surprise likely → S&P drops.
trades.deduction: DOGE hiring freeze + shutdown + oil shock = employment weakness. Nonfarm -92k was massive miss.

trades.entry_reasoning: Fed trapped: oil inflation prevents cuts, employment weakness prevents hikes. No change is the only option. 92 cents is free money.
trades.deduction: Stagflation paralysis: the Fed cannot move in either direction

trades.market: Khamenei Out as Supreme Leader by Mar 31 YES
trades.entry_reasoning: State media silence, bunker damage reports, regional intel. $45M volume = high interest. Signals accumulating.
trades.deduction: Absence of proof of life + bunker damage + state media silence = death likely

trades.market: S&P 500 does NOT hit ATH by Mar 31
trades.entry_reasoning: S&P at lowest close of 2026, -8.7% from ATH. War ongoing, oil >$100, nonfarm -92k. No path to ATH in 3 weeks.
trades.deduction: Markets don't hit ATH during active wars with oil shocks

trades.market: US-Iran Ceasefire Before Oil Hits $120 NO
trades.entry_reasoning: Iran rejected ceasefire proposal Mar 25. No diplomatic path visible. Oil at $107 and rising. $120 before ceasefire is more likely than ceasefire before $120.
trades.deduction: Rejected diplomacy + escalating military action + Hormuz threats = oil keeps rising

recommended_new_positions.thesis: Q4 GDP miss, employment weakness, oil drag

rules_for_next_session: 1. Read this file first. It is your state.
2. Check current odds on all open positions.
3. Check if any catalysts have fired since last session.
5. Decide: hold, sell, or add to positions.
6. Look for new dirt-cheap mispriced markets.
7. Record all trades in this ledger.
8. Update the continuation section for the next session.
9. The goal is always SOFT PROFIT RISE — no big bets, no panic.
10. We make our bet on the things we KNOW through deduction.
